refined_caption: A hospital privacy curtain next to a hospital bed appears to be torn or damaged. The tear is visible, compromising patient privacy.
complaint_description: I was visiting my family member in the hospital and noticed that the privacy curtain in their room was torn. This is concerning because it doesn't provide adequate privacy for patients. The hospital should replace or repair the curtain as soon as possible.
voice_text: The privacy curtain in my room is all torn, can someone please fix it or replace it?
